name: Thorn Brush
description:
This +2 greater striking holy shifting morningstar has a head that appears to be a deep crimson metal rose with thorny petals. When you activate a thorn brush to Shift Weapon, you can cause it to take the shape of a painter's brush. While in this shape, it can't be used as a weapon (it can still be activated to Shift Weapon back into a morningstar), but it does grant a +2 item bonus to Crafting checks to paint or otherwise use the tool while creating artwork.

Activate—Splatter Paint 2 (manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You swing the weapon in an arc, causing a spray of paint of a color of your choice (chosen from black, blue, green, orange, white, or yellow) to splatter all creatures in a . Each creature takes 14d6 energy damage based on the color of the paint (] for black, ] for blue, ] for green, ] for orange, ] for white, or ] for yellow) and must attempt a save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is by paint in its eyes for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is by paint in its eyes for 1 round and then dazzled for 1 minute.
